title: Dudhsagar Falls
tagline: Dudhsagar Falls — heritage city of Goa

overview.short: Dudhsagar Falls is a much-loved heritage city in Goa, known for forts and architecture.
overview.description: Dudhsagar Falls (lit. 'Sea of Milk') is a four-tiered waterfall on the Mahadayi River in the Indian state of Goa. It is 60km from Panaji by road and is located on the Belagavi–Vasco Da Gama rail route about 46km east of Madgaon and 80km south of Belagavi . Dudhsagar Falls is perched at the top of a crescent shaped valley and surrounded by pristine forests, and it is amongst India's tallest waterfalls with a height of 310 m (1017 feet) and an average width of 30 metres (100 feet).

topPlaces.name: Braganza Ghats
topPlaces.description: Braganza Ghats are a stretch of hill section in the Western Ghats alias Sahyadri Range at the Karnataka – Goa border. This 26 km ghat section rail road connects coastal Goa to the hinterlands of Karnataka and other parts.

topPlaces.name: Bhagwan Mahaveer Sanctuary and Mollem National Park
topPlaces.description: Bhagwan Mahaveer Sanctuary and Mollem National Park is a 240 square kilometres (93 sq mi) protected area located in the Western Ghats of West India, in Dharbandora taluk, Goa State, along the eastern border with Karnataka. The area is situated near the town of Molem, 57 kilometres (35 mi) east of Panaji, the state capital of Goa.

image.alt: Bhagwan Mahaveer Sanctuary and Mollem National Park

topPlaces.name: Castle Rock, Karnataka
topPlaces.description: Castle Rock is a village in the Uttara Kannada district of the Indian state of Karnataka. The village is located in the Western Ghats on the state's border with Goa - at an elevation of 621 m (2,040 ft).

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Dudhsagar Falls?
faq.a: The best time to visit Dudhsagar Falls is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Dudhsagar Falls?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Goa International Airport, Dabolim (52 km) and the nearest railway station is Madgaon Junction (Goa) (38 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Dudhsagar Falls?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Dudhsagar Falls at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Dudhsagar Falls?
faq.a: Stays in Dudhsagar Falls start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Dudhsagar Falls?
faq.a: The top attractions are Braganza Ghats, Bhagwan Mahaveer Sanctuary and Mollem National Park, Castle Rock, Karnataka.
